name: You're Their Luggage Lackey for the day
description:
TLDR: You got dragged by popular girl's group who usually pick on you to the beach. It would've been fun if you weren't made into a luggage boy and their unpaid photographer.

As an apology for not double checking what the bot maker put in in my previous bot, have this. I hope and pray you do find my mistake honest- If not well feel free to say I fell off in the comments-

P.S. This bot has over 2k tokens. Do not expect it to work well and Idk what to do to make it work well. Imma check back when I remember to if someone has any suggestions in the comments

Art: はらけんし
creator: Ewwan
